articles.title: Jahangir Khan held after two weeks on the run: How Bengal police tracked down TMC's 'Pushpa'
articles.description: Trinamool candidate Jahangir Khan, nicknamed 'Pushpa', was apprehended near the India-Nepal border after evading arrest for two weeks. Facing multiple criminal charges including murder and extortion, Khan had planned to flee to Nepal. His arrest followed a court vacating his interim protection from arrest.
articles.full_text: Trinamool candidate Jahangir Khan, nicknamed 'Pushpa', was apprehended near the India-Nepal border after evading arrest for two weeks. Facing multiple criminal charges including murder and extortion, Khan had planned to flee to Nepal. His arrest followed a court vacating his interim protection from arrest.

articles.title: US army Apache gunship goes down near Strait of Hormuz: Report
articles.description: A US military Apache helicopter went down near the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday amidst escalating tensions with Iran. The incident occurred following a significant military campaign launched by Donald Trump's administration against the Iranian regime. The exact cause of the crash, whether enemy action or mechanical failure, remains unconfirmed.

articles.title: 'Organised factory of hate': India tears into Pakistan's 'Fitna al Hindustan' campaign at UN
articles.description: India has strongly condemned Pakistan's alleged state-sponsored propaganda campaign at the United Nations, accusing Islamabad of labeling militant groups as 'Fitna al Hindustan' to deflect blame.  New Delhi highlighted Pakistan's internal challenges and military's influence, while also holding it responsible for civilian casualties in Afghanistan due to cross-border military operations.

articles.title: 'In Pakistan, they used to stand with guns outside room': Litton on B'desh's T20 WC withdrawal
articles.description: Bangladesh captain Litton Das has again denied that players decided to skip the 2026 T20 World Cup in India. He said the squad wanted to play and was only informed of the decision, not consulted. Challenging safety concerns, Litton noted Bangladesh had toured Pakistan despite tighter security, saying, “they used to stand with guns outside the room.”

articles.title: Who is Oblivion? Viral Japan livestream sparks Johnny Somali comparisons after dramatic FamilyMart confrontation
articles.description: Kick streamer Oblivion sparked controversy during a June 8 livestream in Japan after being removed from a FamilyMart store and questioned by police over filming. The incident happened while he was traveling with Ryan Garcia. Social media users compared Oblivion to Johnny Somali, while the episode also renewed conversations about privacy rules and streamer behavior in Japan.

articles.title: Who is Joe Weller? British YouTuber opens up about finding God after years of inner battles
articles.description: Joe Weller announced on June 8, 2026, that he has found God and feels at peace after years of mental health struggles. In an emotional social media video, the British YouTuber said faith in Jesus Christ changed his life after other pursuits failed to bring happiness. The announcement went viral, drawing both support and skepticism online.

articles.title: Twitch streamer Kathelina’s controversy deepens as former best friend Snowcone speaks out after Kenneth’s cheating allegations
articles.description: Twitch streamer Kathelina remains at the center of a major online controversy after allegations made by her former boyfriend, Kenneth. The story took another turn when former friend Snowcone shared personal claims about the situation. Her comments sparked criticism from many viewers, who accused her of seeking attention. Kathelina has not publicly responded and remains offline.

articles.title: Commercial LPG shortage impact: IRCTC forced to resume cooking onboard trains; deploys induction stoves
articles.description: To maintain catering services across 1,400 trains serving around 1.7 million meals daily, the railway catering arm has begun preparing food inside Linke Hofmann Busch (LHB) pantry cars using electricity.

articles.title: Oil prices ease as Iran and Israel pause attacks; Brent, WTI retreat from recent highs
articles.description: Oil prices dipped Tuesday as Iran and Israel paused attacks, easing immediate supply disruption fears. This followed a sharp rise on Monday amid renewed Middle East tensions. Despite the de-escalation, concerns linger over the Strait of Hormuz and Houthi actions impacting Red Sea shipping. OPEC+ agreed to boost output, but analysts doubt its effectiveness due to production struggles.

articles.title: CBSE Class 12 re-evaluation window closes: When will revised results be declared?
articles.description: The CBSE has concluded its application window for Class 12 marks verification and re-evaluation, which ran from June 2 to June 7. Over 1.6 lakh students submitted requests for more than 3.8 lakh answer books, despite facing cyber threats. While the board assures a transparent process, some students reported delays in receiving scanned answer sheets.
articles.full_text: The CBSE has concluded its application window for Class 12 marks verification and re-evaluation, which ran from June 2 to June 7. Over 1.6 lakh students submitted requests for more than 3.8 lakh answer books, despite facing cyber threats. While the board assures a transparent process, some students reported delays in receiving scanned answer sheets.

articles.title: AIBE 21 answer key 2026 to be released soon at allindiabarexamination.com: Check steps to download
articles.description: The Bar Council of India will soon release the provisional answer key and response sheet for the All India Bar Examination 21. Candidates can download these to estimate their scores. The examination is for law graduates seeking a Certificate of Practice. Qualifying marks vary by category. The syllabus included new criminal laws.

articles.title: ICSI CS December 2026 Schedule Out: Exams to begin from December 21- Check all dates
articles.description: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) has released the examination schedule for the CS Executive and Professional December 2026 session. Both exams will be conducted offline from December 21 to December 28, 2026, with papers held daily from 2 pm to 5:15 pm.
articles.full_text: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) has released the examination schedule for the CS Executive and Professional December 2026 session. Both exams will be conducted offline from December 21 to December 28, 2026, with papers held daily from 2 pm to 5:15 pm.

articles.title: UPSSSC BCG Technician Mains result 2026 released at upsssc.gov.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.description: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission has announced the BCG Technician Mains examination 2026 results. Candidates can check their scores on the official UPSSSC website. This recruitment drive aimed to fill 255 BCG Technician positions. The results were based on PET 2023 scores. A total of 77 candidates were shortlisted for the next stage.

articles.title: R Madhavan shares gratitude for Padma Shri honour
articles.description: Actor R Madhavan is set to be honored with the prestigious Padma Shri for his significant contributions to Indian cinema. The versatile actor, known for his extensive work across television and over 75 films in various languages, expressed his deep gratitude for the recognition. Madhavan's recent role in 'Dhurandhar' also garnered praise, further solidifying his esteemed position in the industry.

articles.title: Nicola Walker thought her dog co-star was 'dead on a table' on set
articles.description: Nicola Walker, star of 'Unforgotten', was genuinely startled on the set of 'Alice and Steve', mistaking a hyper-realistic rubber prop dog for her deceased canine co-star. The actress shared the peculiar incident, highlighting the oddities of her profession. Meanwhile, co-star Jemaine Clement recounted Mabel the dog's surprising talent for sneezing on command, often at his expense.

articles.title: Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau make red carpet debut- WATCH
articles.description: Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau made a dazzling debut at the Tribeca Festival, walking hand-in-hand for the premiere of Perry's concert film. The couple, radiating affection, shared tender moments on the red carpet and during the screening, with Trudeau expressing his deep admiration for the singer's work. This high-profile appearance further solidifies their public relationship.

articles.title: Praggnanandhaa praises CM Vijay after chess match
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay honored chess prodigy R Praggnanandhaa for his historic Norway Chess Tournament win, presenting him with a Rs 50 lakh reward. The CM also engaged in a friendly chess match with the Grandmaster, who was impressed by Vijay's skills. Praggnanandhaa's mother and a minister were present during the felicitation.
